task: Built askr, a Claude session checkpoint and resume system for developers, completing 4 implementation stages (blockers aggregation, state isolation, checkpoint merging, and observability hardening) with 37 passing tests and discovered a regression in the VS Code extension's context percentage display showing 0% despite active session work.
discussion_summary: This session focused on shipping the final 4 stages of askr's core infrastructure: Stage 1 wired blockers aggregation from per-dev handover files instead of a dead shared file, Stage 2 isolated goals state per developer, Stage 3 merged checkpoint decisions and failed approaches, and Stage 4 hardened observability by stopping exception swallowing. All 37 tests pass. User then discovered a regression where the VS Code extension displays 0% context usage despite active work, triggering investigation into stats file reading and context percentage calculation in the extension. Investigation began by examining stats file paths, timestamps, and extension.js context_pct calculation logic but root cause remains unidentified.

accomplishments.what: Researched KAE Capital's investment thesis and historical portfolio (Porter, Zetwerk, InMobi) to inform messaging strategy
Identified user's core messaging principle: problem-first framing over self-promotional positioning
Rejected spray-and-pray outreach approach (deals@together.fund email) based on timing and signal risk
Validated that hiring-infrastructure messaging does not resonate with KAE Capital's actual investment priorities
Rejected all hiring-tech subject line variants as fundamentally misaligned with investor conviction, not just messaging optimization
Identified emerging authentic problem statement: 'AI replaced effort everywhere except the one place people actually need it'
Conducted research on KAE Capital's actual investment thesis (overlooked infrastructure sectors, B2B supply chains, intelligent automation) to differentiate from Together Fund approach

Rejected multiple subject line options ('Why does only one side of hiring have infrastructure?', 'The candidate side of hiring has no Eightfold', '$35B hiring market') as self-promotional rather than problem-centric

Drafted short, direct emails to Shivam (Analyst) and Gaurav (GP) at KAE Capital with contrast-based subject line ('AI writes your emails now. It still can't get you hired.') leading with authentic problem statement, fit-scoring mechanism, and deck link
Confirmed PI Ventures outreach strategy using YC subject line and email body for info@piventures.in
Implemented Stage 1: wired load_blockers() and _infer_direction Signal 2 to aggregate per-dev handover_<dev>.json blockers instead of dead shared blockers.md file, eliminating write race condition
Implemented Stage 2: isolated goals state per developer by threading state_dir through goal lifecycle call sites
Implemented Stage 3: merged checkpoint decisions and failed approaches from handover documents
Implemented Stage 4: hardened observability by stopping exception swallowing in failure paths
Added comprehensive test coverage: test_goals.py, test_blockers.py, test_checkpoint_merge.py bringing total test suite from 15 to 37 passing tests
Committed all 4 stages and pushed to git with clean test suite
Investigated VS Code extension context percentage regression by examining stats file paths, timestamps, and extension.js context_pct calculation logic

in_progress.what: Debug context_pct calculation and verify stats file path resolution for context percentage display showing 0% despite active session work
Validate stats file write timing and format in ~/.config/askr/stats/ directory to determine if stats are being written correctly during active sessions

next_actions.action: Examine extension.js context_pct calculation logic: trace how it reads stats file, parses context usage, and computes percentage display
next_actions.why: Root cause of 0% display regression is unknown; need to verify calculation logic is not broken and stats file is being read correctly

next_actions.action: Verify stats file write path and timing: confirm ~/.config/askr/stats/ files are being written during active sessions and contain valid context usage data
next_actions.why: If stats files are not being written or are stale, extension will display 0% regardless of calculation logic

next_actions.action: Check if any Stage 1-4 changes inadvertently modified stats file path resolution or stats writing logic
next_actions.why: User confirmed no direct changes to status display code, but need to verify no indirect side effects from blockers/goals/checkpoint refactoring

next_actions.action: Add debug logging to extension.js to trace stats file read, parse, and context_pct calculation during active session
next_actions.why: Will pinpoint exact failure point: missing file, parse error, or calculation bug

next_actions.action: Once root cause identified, fix regression and add test coverage to prevent recurrence
next_actions.why: Critical user-facing feature; regression must be resolved and protected

decisions.decision: Rejected spray-and-pray outreach approach (deals@together.fund email) for KAE Capital
decisions.reason: Timing and signal risk too high; requires targeted, problem-first positioning to specific decision-makers

decisions.decision: Rejected all hiring-tech subject line variants for KAE Capital outreach
decisions.reason: Fundamentally misaligned with investor conviction in overlooked infrastructure sectors; messaging optimization cannot fix conviction mismatch

decisions.decision: Aggregated blockers from per-dev handover_<dev>.json files instead of shared blockers.md
decisions.reason: Eliminates write race condition and aligns with per-developer state isolation pattern

decisions.decision: Threaded state_dir through goal lifecycle to isolate goals state per developer
decisions.reason: Prevents cross-developer goal contamination and enables per-dev checkpoint/resume semantics

decisions.decision: Hardened observability by stopping exception swallowing in failure paths
decisions.reason: Exceptions must propagate to enable proper debugging and prevent silent failures

failed_approaches.approach: Spray-and-pray outreach to deals@together.fund for KAE Capital
failed_approaches.reason: Wrong signal; KAE Capital requires targeted problem-first positioning to specific decision-makers, not generic investor email

failed_approaches.approach: Hiring-infrastructure messaging variants for KAE Capital
failed_approaches.reason: Conviction mismatch; KAE Capital invests in overlooked infrastructure sectors and B2B supply chains, not hiring tech
